name: ACULA Technology Corp.
summary: ACULA Technology Corp. provides video solutions and services in Taiwan and internationally. It offers closed-circuit television (CCTV) monitors; combo DVR/NVR products; medical displays; IP monitors with POE; IP public view monitors with POE; industrial monitors-touch monitors/point of sale (POS); digital signage/public information display products; and high-brightness monitors. The company also provides OEM/ODM display products. It offers CCTV products for use in apartment complexes, airports, bars, casinos, daycares, schools, parks, fast food restaurants, hotels, night clubs, parking lots, office buildings, shopping malls, train/bus stations, and warehouses, as well as for home owners; and POS products for food service, hospitality, retail, and public markets. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
